# houdinimd

Houdini documentation as clean markdown for LLMs.

Base URL: https://houdinimd.jchd.me

## Markdown Access

Append `.md` to any docs URL to get clean markdown output:

  https://houdinimd.jchd.me/docs/houdini/{path}.md

Full SideFX URL form — auto-redirects to markdown:

  https://houdinimd.jchd.me/https://www.sidefx.com/docs/houdini/{path}.html.md

The proxy resolves any valid SideFX docs URL on-demand — content is not limited to pre-indexed pages.
A full path list is available at https://houdinimd.jchd.me/sitemap.xml.

## URL Pattern

```
https://houdinimd.jchd.me/docs/houdini/{path}
```

Path mirrors SideFX docs structure. Examples:
- `vex/functions/foreach` - VEX foreach function
- `hom/hou/Node` - Python hou.Node class
- `nodes/sop/attribwrangle` - Attribute Wrangle node

## Categories

| Path | Content |
|------|---------|
| `vex/functions/*` | VEX functions |
| `vex/arrays`, `vex/lang`, `vex/snippets` | VEX language |
| `hom/hou/*` | Python API (hou module) |
| `nodes/{type}/*` | Nodes (sop, dop, cop, rop, vop) |
| `ref/commands` | HScript commands |
| `ref/expression_functions` | Expression functions |
